exact_discouraged: rendered in unreal and octane and nuke

phrase_rewrites.to: specify key light, fill behavior, rim light, practicals, atmosphere, and color temperature
phrase_rewrites.why: generic wording hides actual art direction

phrase_rewrites.to: specify camera position, lens feel, focal depth, and material response
specify framing, subject placement, leading lines, and negative space
phrase_rewrites.why: beauty is not a camera instruction

collision_rules.advice: choose a primary family and justify any hybridization
capture cues and render-pipeline cues can clash; prefer one dominant visual language
clarify whether physics or dream logic should dominate
